disclosure_chain: KAP 265789 (real-estate disposal) -> KAP 312317 (completion update); same linked Kapadık, Esenyurt, 382 ada 11 parsel disposal; completion 2013-10-01

resolution.1_same_transaction_officially_verified: RESOLVED — official KAP disclosure chain links 265789 -> 312317 through the previous-notification reference and the same Kapadık, Esenyurt, 382 ada 11 parsel disposal; final update reports completion on 2013-10-01. Recorded as ONE transaction, not two independent sales.
resolution.4_related_party_verified: RESOLVED — official KAP forms report 'Karşı Taraf İle Olan İlişkinin Niteliği = Yoktur'; related_party=false with related_party_basis=official_old_form_relation_none. No modern structured SPK boolean was invented (the old form did not contain one).
resolution.5_same_currency: RESOLVED — sale (USD) normalized to TRY so both economic amounts are in the same currency.
resolution.6_documented_official_tcmb_rate: RESOLVED — TCMB EVDS series TP.DK.USD.A.YTL, USD/TRY buying rate 2.03650000, conversion date 2013-10-01 (transaction completion date). No rate fabricated.
resolution.7_vat_comparable: RESOLVED — official valuation-report attachment reports appraisal on a KDV Hariç basis; sale is 7,533,161 USD + KDV (excluding VAT). Both compared excluding VAT; no VAT added to either side.
resolution.8_no_mismatched_vat_ratio: RESOLVED — follows from #7: both sides excluding VAT, so log(sale/appraisal) mixes no gross-of-VAT and net-of-VAT bases.

_note: PENDING_AUDIT -> ADMITTED after manual source-audit against the official KAP disclosure chain, the official KAP valuation-report attachment (KDV Hariç), and the official TCMB EVDS exchange-rate series (TP.DK.USD.A.YTL). Recorded as ONE linked transaction across two disclosures (NOT two independent sales). Now a genuine audited KAP negotiated-disposal observation in validation/structural/kap.json; it enters the negotiation-calibration subset and kap_log_ratio, and remains excluded from asking_to_closing_labels(). No exchange rate, VAT basis, or related-party status was fabricated; all were source-audited.
